    Method
    Description
    PromptContext
    OrasakaOrchestrationPipeline.process(String rawUserQuery, OrasakaContext context)
    Executes the interceptor pipeline chain on the raw user input query.
    PromptContext
    PromptContext.withRefinedPrompt(String refinedPrompt)
    Returns a copy of this context with a new refined prompt.
    PromptContext

    Returns a copy of this context with a new routed provider.
    PromptContext

    Returns a copy of this context with a new system metadata map.
    PromptContext
    PromptContext.withUserMetadata(Map<String,Object> userMetadata)
    Returns a copy of this context with a new user metadata map.
